title: Infinity Fix
body:
Infinity Fix Mod for Fabric
====
Make infinity enchantment more balance.

Features:

1. Allow mending and infinity enchantments to coexist
2. Higher level infinity enchantment (up to 3)
3. There is only 1/6 1/3 or 1/2 chance (per level) of getting an arrow back when shooting(just like Minecraft Dungeons)(TIP: you can always pick the arrow back if it failed to recycle)
4. Works server-side only (Installing on both side can get better experience)
